tools.name: search_saas
tools.description: Search the SaaS directory by query, category, or keywords. Returns matching tools with descriptions, pricing, and features.

tools.name: get_recommendations
tools.description: Get personalized SaaS recommendations based on role, business type, or specific needs.

tools.name: get_saas_details
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific SaaS tool including full description, features, and pricing.

tools.name: list_categories
tools.description: Get all available SaaS categories in the directory with tool counts.

tools.name: get_blog_posts
tools.description: Get blog posts and guides about SaaS tools. Filter by tool ID or search by topic.

tools.name: get_all_saas
tools.description: Get the complete list of all SaaS tools in the directory.

tools.name: get_directory_stats
tools.description: Get statistics about the directory (total tools, categories, etc.).
